---
title: "scPathway basic"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{scPathway basic}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(scPathway)
data("toy_expr", package = "scPathway")

sc <- score_pathway(
  expr = toy_expr$expr,
  meta = toy_expr$meta,
  geneset = "immune_small",
  seurat = FALSE,
  method = "rank"
)
```
